# Twisted Oak Taxidermy

## About
Professional taxidermy services based in Mount Airy, North Carolina. Run by Austin, a licensed taxidermist certified for both regular and avian taxidermy.

## Services
- Deer shoulder mounts ($550+)
- European skull mounts ($150+)
- Bird and waterfowl mounts ($275+)
- Fish skin mounts ($14/inch) and reproductions ($16/inch)
- Turkey mounts and fan/beard displays
- Full body mounts for small game
- Custom habitat bases
- Rug mounts
- Repair and re-mount services
- Hide tanning

## Contact
- Phone: (336) 648-6996
- Location: Mount Airy, NC
- Hours: Monday-Saturday 8AM-6PM, Sunday by appointment
- Website: https://twistedoaktaxidermy.com

## Service Area
Mount Airy, Pilot Mountain, King, Elkin, Dobson, Surry County NC, Stuart VA, Galax VA. Also accepts shipped specimens from anywhere.

## Payment
50% deposit at drop-off, balance at pickup. Cash, credit/debit card (Square), and cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDC via Coinbase Commerce) accepted.

## Turnaround
6-12 months for most mounts. Rush service available.
